name: deep-work
description: Evidence-Driven Development Protocol — Codex CLI port of claude-deep-work v6.4.0 (B-α scope)

interface.longDescription: Codex CLI plugin that drives a 5-phase auto-flow (Brainstorm → Research → Plan → Implement → Test) with TDD enforcement and receipt validation. Requires the multi_agent feature flag for parallel subagent dispatch — set [features].multi_agent = true in ~/.codex/config.toml.
defaultPrompt: /deep-work "task description" 로 자동 워크플로우 시작 (multi_agent feature flag 필요)
